title: centaurea nigra subsp. endressii
intro: Centaurea nigra subsp. endressii, also known as the knapweed or centaury, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and fever, as well as to treat conditions such as bronchitis and arthritis. Herbal preparations of Centaurea nigra subsp. endressii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting a healthy immune system.
